summary: Verified isSteak() function fix - all steak products (Ribeye, Filet Mignon, NY Strip, Porterhouse, T-Bone, Tomahawk Steak, Flank Steak) now correctly show grade/aging customization options. Price calculation working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: isSteak() function fix verified. The function now uses steakKeywords array to detect steak products: ['steak', 'ribeye', 'rib eye', 'filet', 'mignon', 'ny strip', 'new york', 'porterhouse', 't-bone', 't bone', 'tomahawk', 'sirloin', 'tenderloin', 'wagyu']. All 7 steak products show Customizable badge and grade/aging selectors when selected.

isSteak_detection.Filet Mignon: PASS - Shows Customizable badge and grade/aging selectors
isSteak_detection.Ribeye: PASS - Shows Customizable badge and grade/aging selectors
isSteak_detection.NY Strip: PASS - Shows Customizable badge and grade/aging selectors
isSteak_detection.Porterhouse: PASS - Shows Customizable badge and grade/aging selectors
isSteak_detection.T-Bone: PASS - Shows Customizable badge and grade/aging selectors
isSteak_detection.Tomahawk Steak: PASS - Shows Customizable badge and grade/aging selectors
isSteak_detection.Flank Steak: PASS - Shows Customizable badge and grade/aging selectors

frontend_ui.price_calculation: PASS - NY Strip $38 base + $8 Prime grade = $46.00 displayed correctly
frontend_ui.grade_selector: PASS - Shows Standard, Prime (+$8/lb), Grass Fed (+$4/lb), Wagyu (+$15/lb)
frontend_ui.dry_aging_selector: PASS - Shows Fresh, 21 Days (+$6), 35 Days (+$10), 45 Days (+$15)

feature_verification.isSteak_function_fix: VERIFIED - Now detects Ribeye, Filet Mignon, NY Strip, Porterhouse, T-Bone, Sirloin, Tenderloin, Wagyu in addition to products with 'steak' in name
feature_verification.customizable_badge: VERIFIED - All 7 steak products show '🥩 Customizable' badge
feature_verification.grade_aging_selectors: VERIFIED - Appear when steak product is selected
feature_verification.price_calculation: VERIFIED - Grade modifier applied per lb correctly
